Shim for _umath_tests to allow a deprecation period for the new name.
Nz|numpy.core.umath_tests is an internal NumPy module and should not be imported. It will be removed in a future NumPy release.
category
stacklevel
__doc__
warnings
warn
DeprecationWarningZ
_umath_tests
</usr/lib64/python3.9/site-packages/numpy/core/umath_tests.py
<module>
